title: A cap for covering a plug opening
abstract: The present disclosure envisages a cap for covering a plug opening. The cap comprises at least one recessed portion having a cross section complementary to a cross section of the plug opening, wherein a first operative end of the recessed portion is fitted into the plug. A top lid is configured on the recessed portion. The top lid and the at least one recessed portion are adapted to prevent ingress of foreign particles to the plug. A lanyard extends from the recessed portion, and a ring is configured at a free end of the lanyard. The ring is adapted to be fitted on a body of the plug. The lanyard and the ring allow the cap to remain attached to the plug in the configuration when the at least one recessed portion is fitted on or not fitted on the plug.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A cap for covering a plug opening, said cap comprising: at least one recessed portion having a cross section complementary to a cross section of said plug opening, wherein a first operative end of said recessed portion is configured to fit into said plug opening; a top lid configured on said recessed portion, said top lid and said at least one recessed portion adapted to prevent ingress of foreign particles to said plug; a lanyard extending from said at least one recessed portion; and a ring configured at a free end of said lanyard, said ring adapted to be fitted on a body of said plug, said lanyard and said ring allowing said cap to remain attached to said plug in the configuration when said at least one recessed portion is fitted on or not fitted on said plug. 2. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said lanyard is longitudinally flexible, and configured to be twisted along the longitudinal axis thereof. 3. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said cap comprises two recessed portions co- axially extending from opposite operative surfaces of said top lid. 4. The cap as claimed in claim 3, wherein said two recessed portions have unequal cross sections to facilitate said cap to cover plugs of different cross sections. 5. The cap as claimed in claim 1, further comprising a sealing lip configured on said at least one recessed portion to allow tight fitment of said recessed portion in said plug opening. 6. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said at least one recessed portion has a cylindrical shape. 7. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said recessed portion, said top lid, said lanyard, and said ring are made of at least one material selected from a group consisting of rubber and silicon. 8. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said cap is made of at least one material selected from the group consisting of neoprene, nitrile rubber, ethylene propylene rubber, silicone rubber, polyurethane, and polybutadiene. 9. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said lanyard is provided with a reinforcing wire. 10. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said lanyard is integral with said at least one recessed portion and said ring. 11. The cap as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said lanyard is provided with a metallic core. 12. The cap as claimed in claim 11, wherein said metallic core is a spring. 13. The cap as claimed in claim 11, wherein said metallic core comprises a layer of a resilient material injection moulded thereon to provide a reinforced lanyard. 14. The cap as claimed in claim 13, wherein said resilient material is at least one selected from rubber and silicon. 15. The cap as claimed in claim 13, wherein said resilient material is at least one material selected from a group consisting of neoprene, nitrile rubber, ethylene propylene rubber, silicone rubber, polyurethane, and polybutadiene. 16. The cap as claimed in claim 1, wherein said cap is locked on said body of said plug via: a locking bracket insertable in a slot configured on said cap such that a locking portion of said locking bracket extends beyond a periphery of said cap, wherein in an assembled configuration, said locking portion extends through a slot configured on said body of said plug; and a padlock for locking said locking bracket and said dust cap with said body.
